title: AI SEO is becoming a business visibility problem
summary: Your website may rank on Google and still be hard for answer engines to explain.
takeaway: Answer who you help, what you solve, what proof you show, and what buyer question you answer best.

title: What should a small business automate first?
summary: Start with one painful workflow, one owner, and one measurable outcome.
takeaway: For many service businesses, lead intake or follow-up is the first workflow to review.

title: Why agent workflows need proof
summary: Business AI agents need source checks, authority boundaries, and delivery evidence.
takeaway: A drafted action is not the same as a completed action.

title: How RAG improves business AI answers
summary: Retrieval helps AI answer with relevant sources instead of vague generalities.
takeaway: Source-backed answers are easier to trust, correct, and improve.
